case_title: ESTATE OF ROBERT F.DAY VS MAC MASTERS, RUSSELL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY ESTATE OF ROBERT F.DAY AS TO DEFENDANT MAC MASTERS, RUSSELL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-12-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CORRESPONDENCE FROM RUSSELL MCMASTERS WITH A CHECK FOR $200. SENT TO COURT.
MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS FILED BY DEFENDANT MAC MASTERS, RUSSELL HEARING SET FOR JUN-26-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
CONT.REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF; MAILED OUT INFO RE: REQUIREMENTS AND FEES.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS CONTINUED FROM JUN-26-1998 TO JUL-24-1998 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR TIME PAYMENTS OF JUL-24-1998, GRANTED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MAC MASTERS, RUSSELL
PER PLAINTIFF'S WRITEN REQUEST PAPERS FOR SERVICE WERE FORWARDED TO SHERIFF.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ESTATE OF ROBERT F.DAY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MAC MASTERS, RUSSELL $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $46.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,446.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MAC MASTERS, RUSSELL
